reviews.review_description: This my 10th game that i bought on Oculus store and i must say that this is way more good than i thought... Things are very very big ,makes you feel like an Ant ... Really loved the concept , very unique and relaxing

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback. Good to hear that you loved the game :)

reviews.review_description: Great idea and good to a point but after s while it freezes keyboard comes up but nothing else shame because I did like the game.have uninstalled it twice  and tried again but same problem

But needs more features and things to do. how bout adding a non game mode to have fun with the objects, animals etc. If possible add a zoom in zoom out feature to make things bigger or smaller also add movement as well. its kind of laggy or shakey on my s6 edge plus but other than that its not bad for now. oh by the way its just my opinion but i think the graphics and anti aliasing can use a little more improvement but dont get me wrong its still good.

developer_response.body:
Hey Buddy,
Thanks for the feedback. Loved the non game mode and movement addition. We will have look at s6 edge plus performance and will definitely improve add it.

Again, Thank you very much, good to hear that you loved the concept. :)
